query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus, o.customerName, st.stamps, st.action, st.id as txId
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN stamp_transactions st ON st.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.customerName LIKE '%Rangan%' OR o.customerName LIKE '%Swamy%'
ORDER BY o.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
